content:
I wrote up a proposal for Task becoming a builtin. I think there's a strong case for it as a standalone proposal, but really it's best when paired with a second proposal regarding modules...that other proposal is still WIP (I'm hoping to finish it this weekend!) but I figured I'd share this proposal since it's done and works on its own: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-h9bNNCLuYV2wSvjQA58SsGHOJivH9NHGr4wU_VF5I0/edit?usp=sharing

all feedback welcome!
I love how this all comes together to achieve a really good balance of ergonomics, performance and safety. Really cool!
56 messages were moved from this topic to #ideas > Stored ability by Richard Feldman.
